name: Lasagne Rolls
recipeIngredient: 4 Curly edge lasagne noodles (12 x 3 in pieces cooked)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F. Spray 2 individual casseroles with nonstick cooking spray; set aside.
2. In a small bowl, combine ricotta cheese, egg, shredded mozzarella cheese, 1 tbsp grated parmesan cheese, and the seasonings, mixing well.
3. Place cooked lasagne noodles on a damp towel and spoon 1/4 of the cheese mixture lengthwise along the center of each noodle, starting from the narrow end. Carefully roll each noodle to enclose the filling.
4. Place 2 rolls in each sprayed casserole and spoon 2 tbsp tomato sauce over each roll. Sprinkle each roll with 3/4 tbsp grated parmesan cheese.
5. Bake until thoroughly heated for 35-40 minutes. Serve garnished with flat leaf parsley leaves.
